overall.description: First-person perspective swimming underwater in a diving mask, ascending to the surface of an alien ocean. Upon surfacing, a massive planet dominates the sky as the camera swims through rolling waves toward a distant structure on the horizon.

events.description: ascending through water surface, transitioning from underwater to open air

agents.ego_description: swimming upward through the water column while wearing a diving mask, approaching the surface with light filtering from above

entered.detail: red-tinted diving mask frame visible at the edges of the viewport
rippling water surface seen from below with sunlight creating bright caustic patterns

segments.scene_description: The view shows a first-person perspective from inside a diving mask, looking up through greenish water toward the bright surface. Light rays and caustics dance across the view as the camera ascends steadily toward the water's surface.

scene_state.functional_zone: alien ocean surface with massive celestial body

events.description: distant ship or platform structure becomes visible on the left horizon
swimming motion creates splashes and spray visible at the bottom of the frame

agents.ego_description: swimming forward through choppy ocean waves on an alien world, navigating toward a distant structure while the large planet looms overhead

entered.detail: choppy dark ocean waves with whitecaps at water level
massive planet with visible cloud bands and craters dominating the sky
dark rocky formation or cliff visible on the left horizon initially
large vessel or industrial platform structure on the horizon

segments.scene_description: Breaking the surface reveals a vast alien ocean under a huge planet filling the sky. The camera swims through rolling waves toward a distant structure visible on the horizon, with water splashing at the edge of the frame. The rocky outcrop initially visible on the left is replaced by a clearer view of a distant ship or platform as the swim continues.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person ascent from the depths of a greenish alien ocean to a vast, open seascape dominated by a celestial body. It begins underwater, looking upward through a diving mask as light rays and dancing caustics flicker across the view during a steady climb toward the surface. As the camera breaks through the water's tension, the submerged world gives way to a wide horizon under a massive planet that fills the sky. The scene then shifts into a rhythmic swim through rolling waves, with water splashing at the edges of the frame as a rocky outcrop on the left recedes. Finally, the perspective pushes forward across the undulating water, focusing on a distant ship or platform emerging on the horizon.
